verses.3: From the rising of the sun to its going down,
verses.4: The LORD is high above all nations,
verses.5: Who is like the LORD, our God,
verses.6: who stoops down to see in heaven and in the earth?
verses.7: He raises up the poor out of the dust,
verses.8: that he may set him with princes,
verses.9: He settles the barren woman in her home
